indications.text:
INTERMEZZO ® (zolpidem tartrate) sublingual tablet is indicated for use as needed for the
treatment of insomnia when a middle-of-the-night awakening is followed by difficulty returning
to sleep.
Limitations of Use: INTERMEZZO is not indicated for the treatment of middle-of-the-night
